focusPoints.label: Strategic impact and leverage in partnerships.
focusPoints.reason: What strategic impact he's having in partner alliances is what gets evaluated for growth — this is where leverage and promotion readiness are visible.

focusPoints.label: Trust and influence with key partners.
focusPoints.reason: Whether he's building trust and influence with key partners matters for his growth — this is the core of an alliance manager's role.

focusPoints.label: Skills and areas to stretch for promotion.
focusPoints.reason: What skills or areas he needs to stretch to be ready for promotion — this is where the growth plan becomes actionable.

name: Machar
notes: Things going well. Looking at promoting him soon.
